recentTweets.text:
The SAVE America Act has never been more important than it is right now. 

278,000 non-citizens registered to vote in federal elections. This isn’t rhetoric. This is data. 

Listen to @POTUS and PASS THE SAVE AMERICA ACT! https://t.co/3zjz11uKCp

I led a letter to @BrendanCarrFCC with 45 of my Republican colleagues supporting the FCC's review of TV Parental Guidelines ensuring children are not being indoctrinated with radical ideology behind their parents' backs.

The attack on parental rights must stop! https://t.co/SoSPjzHrmp

The House passed legislation to make Daylight Saving Time permanent and end the twice-a-year clock changes. 

President Trump supported it, and I was proud to vote yes. 

It’s time to stop the confusion and make life a little easier for American families.

On this day two years ago, President Trump stood back up - and so did the America First movement. 

Grateful for the Lord’s protection over @POTUS as we continue fighting for the America First agenda!
“And you shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.” - Mark 12:30

Sharia law is here and already taking over American communities. 

Congress needs to stop this madness before it spreads! 

Ban sharia law now!

Without the SAVE America Act, Americans may never trust an election again. 

Listen to @POTUS and NUKE the filibuster to get it done!

This project is about more than a bridge. It's about strengthening the Port of Mobile, supporting jobs, and keeping commerce moving across the Gulf Coast. 

Alabama and our nation will be stronger when this bridge is built! 

Thank you, @MayorSpiro!

This is a game changer for South Alabama and our entire state. 

Grateful to @POTUS, @SecDuffy, @SenKatieBritt, @SenTuberville, Governor Ivey, and the entire Alabama delegation for working tirelessly to make this a reality.

Immigration looked like a Disney fast pass system under Biden.

Just over a year in and @POTUS has already cleaned up the southern border and put Americans first!
"The Lord will be king over the whole earth. On that day, there will be one Lord, and his name the only name." - Zechariah 14:9

On July 4, 1776, brave patriots stood up to tyranny and declared that freedom would be our foundation. Today, we honor their courage, their sacrifice, and the blessings of liberty that we continue to fight for.

America remains that shining city on a hill — a nation worth https://t.co/9QeQLNK4wO

President Trump secured the border. Now it's time to fix our legal immigration system.
My Americans First Immigration Act puts American workers first, ends the diversity visa lottery, and creates a merit-based system that serves our nation.

https://t.co/lZMWgaqrUp

Individuals who suffer from Trump Derangement Syndrome have participated in nationwide political and social unrest, even trying to assassinate @POTUS twice.

These people need help, and the Trump Derangement Syndrome (TDS) Research Act, which I co-lead, provides that!

The American people deserve leaders who put their safety first - not politicians who shield those here illegally from accountability. 

We owe it to every American family to restore law and order and put public safety above politics. https://t.co/ldC1up3O0V

This is an extremely disappointing decision out of the Supreme Court. 

The American people deserve an immigration system that serves the nation - not one that incentivizes illegal immigration. Congress must end birthright citizenship. https://t.co/yGJAmLNap4

This is right in the heart of one of the fastest growing areas in Alabama. The days of saying this could never happen in America are over.  

Sharia law is here. Congress must ban sharia law NOW for the safety of American families.  

https://t.co/DNRZN0N02r
“Some trust in chariots and some in horses, but we trust in the name of the Lord our God. They collapse and fall, but we rise and stand upright.” - Psalm 20:7-8

Nothing about the SAVE America Act should be controversial - it’s common sense. 

Pass the Save America Act!

Americans want secure elections. 

The SAVE America Act delivers. 

NUKE the filibuster and let’s get it done.

Glad the Supreme Court understands what Democrats don’t, that temporary means temporary. 

Now it’s time to put America First and send those who came here illegally back to their country!

There is no legislation that is more important than the SAVE America Act. 

The Senate needs to listen to @POTUS and NUKE the filibuster to pass the SAVE America Act!

I have legislation sitting in the House right now that would require labels on children’s shows that push transgender propaganda. 

The majority of American parents want this, let’s make it happen!

https://t.co/3fZgVvIyxF
“Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewal of your mind, that by testing you may discern what is the will of God, what is good and acceptable and perfect.” - Romans 12:2

I’ve supported the SAVE Act since it was originally introduced in the 118th Congress, and my support for it only grows every day. 

Why won’t we send something 80% of Americans want to the President’s desk?

Greatest president of my lifetime! 

Thank you, @POTUS for your unwavering commitment to American greatness! 🇺🇸

I’m with you, @POTUS! 

Democrats will nuke the filibuster the first chance they get to enact their radical, America last agenda. 

Republicans need to make sure this doesn’t happen by nuking the filibuster now and passing the SAVE America Act! https://t.co/Vka8I1sL4P

Ban Sharia law.

Pass the SAVE America Act.

Protecting Americans’ safety and ensuring only Americans vote in American elections is that simple.

RT @freedomcaucus: There is nothing more important for the Senate to pass right now than the SAVE America Act.

@RepBarryMoore https://t.co…
So grateful to our law enforcement and @FBIDirectorKash for their hard work in preventing this planned attack on the White House!

President Trump has finalized a deal with Iran to prevent them from ever having a nuclear weapon.

He has also authorized the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

His critics say he can't do it, and President Trump proves them wrong every single time.

God bless our great https://t.co/mKaJn09Aph

Honored to stand for the flag that embodies freedom, faith, and the enduring spirit of the American people. On Flag Day, we celebrate the stars and stripes and the patriots who have defended our nation. https://t.co/tJEwvg5ltY

The United States Army has spent 251 years proving a simple truth: freedom survives because brave men and women are willing to defend it. 

Today, we honor the generations of Soldiers whose courage, sacrifice, and service have preserved the blessings of liberty for all Americans. https://t.co/YHB8XjUctl
https://t.co/1RQ3003o6C

Securing our elections so that only American citizens can vote in American elections is the most important thing the Senate can do. 

Pass the SAVE America Act!
https://t.co/6OFx9GwCdk

Liberal cities have gotten away with harboring illegals due to their "sanctuary city" policies for too long. 

My legislation would require federal agencies to relocate existing offices from these liberal "sanctuary cities" to communities who respect our nation's laws.

Parents deserve to know what their children are watching. 

That shouldn't be controversial - it's common sense. 

That's why I introduced H.R. 9067 to give families transparency and strengthen parental authority!

The SPLC deceived their donors for years by not being upfront on what their donations were used for. 

They now refuse to comply with @AGSteveMarshall’s subpoena and answer for deceiving Alabamians. 

It’s time for the SPLC to give Alabamians the answers they deserve. https://t.co/4LMUxWWvZ7
If flying a flag outside of my office encouraging prayer gets me on the SPLC target list, it’s a list I’m proud to be on!

Back in DC for a busy week on the floor!

Tonight, we voted on two bills aimed at reducing fraud throughout the federal government. 

This week, we’ll also be voting to fund DHS and Border Patrol so they can continue the important work of removing illegals! https://t.co/Suls8KmNQq
https://t.co/64mMb46dP9
“Before the mountains were born or you brought forth the earth and the world, from everlasting to everlasting you are God.” - Psalm 90:2

On the anniversary of D-Day, we honor the courage, sacrifice, and resolve of the Greatest Generation. Their bravery secured the freedoms we enjoy today.

We will never forget. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/2VOzYaAJ7n

The American people are tired of the revolving door between Congress and K Street.

That's why I just introduced the BLAST Act Banning Lobbying and Safeguarding Trust to permanently ban former Members of Congress from lobbying Congress after they leave office.

Drain the swamp!
Today, the Senate Amendment to pass the SAVE America Act failed. Democrats have once again shown they do not want elections to remain free, fair, and decided by Americans.

The revolving door in Washington needs to be closed.

That’s why I just introduced a bill to BAN members of Congress from becoming lobbyists after they leave office.

If members of Congress believe in a cause, they shouldn’t need a lobbying contract to fight for it.
Thank you to @RepVindman, @RepEliCrane, and @RepMGP for joining me in ending the revolving door in Congress!

This isn’t animosity against trans people, this is ensuring our military is the most capable fighting force on the planet. 

I hope @DustinOlson is right about this being appealed, but it is further proof of the need for my Readiness Over Wokeness Act! https://t.co/JZbaNTRdQ4

The political arena is filled with a lot of noise, but Heather and I have always stood firm in our faith. 

Our trust in the Lord is never something we need to put on display, but it's the foundation that has carried us.

The signal is our devotion to the Lord. We will always https://t.co/f2Dab87Hs8

STAND UP to the left-wing media agenda. 

STOP normalizing grown men in dresses calming to be little girls in children’s TV shows.

PASS my legislation https://t.co/zColPN7pUA
https://t.co/snVH1TWrzp

It's time to pass my legislation and ensure parents are warned about this indoctrination! 

https://t.co/oiNT93xGI5

American elections should be decided by AMERICANS. 

Pass the SAVE Act and secure our elections.
It's time to put the power back where it belongs - in the hands of parents!

Far-left radicals want to mutilate the youth of America through hormone blockers, butcherous sex-change surgeries, and graphic propaganda through entertainment. 

It's time to hold them accountable and restore common sense.

STOP sneaking toxic agendas into programming meant for children

RESTORE common sense back to our families 

PASS my legislation to respect parental authority and holds media companies accountable for targeting our children. 
https://t.co/0Qsu60VCt8

Parents should be warned before their children's television shows are filled with transgender propaganda. 

I have just introduced legislation that will require a televised disclaimer warning parents of any trans content at the start of the program. 

No more indoctrinating our https://t.co/xMP9kzt0Ux
